title: Cozy Crunchy Greek Walnut Salad
description: A comforting Greek salad packed with crunchy walnuts, fresh vegetables, and a tangy vinaigrette, crafted to be low‑sodium and vegetarian.
instructions: Wash the cucumber and parsley. Slice the cucumber into half‑moon shapes.
Halve the cherry tomatoes and thinly slice the red onion.
Place the cucumber, tomatoes, onion, parsley, and chopped olives into a large bowl.
Crumble the low‑sodium feta cheese into the bowl and toss gently.
Toast the walnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2–3 minutes, stirring frequently until fragrant; remove and let cool.
Add the toasted walnuts to the salad.
In a small bowl whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, lemon juice, dried oregano, and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve the salad at room temperature or chilled, garnished with a few extra walnut halves if desired.
